financial.note: SCB acts as the registrar for major debenture tranches (e.g., EA269A); rising interest rates increase the servicing cost of EA's ~56bn THB total liabilities.
Significant exposure to EA's project financing for the Chachoengsao Gigafactory; debt-to-equity covenant pressure makes the stock sensitive to BBL's prime rate.

supply_chain.note: Critical tech provider for battery cells; production yields in Taiwan directly impact the scalability of EA's domestic Giga-factory.
Raw material for biodiesel (B100); rising Crude Palm Oil (CPO) prices compress the marketing margin of the biodiesel segment.
Primary demand source for electric buses through the NEX-EA ecosystem; urban transit electrification cycles drive order backlog.

competitors.note: Direct competition in the Energy Storage System (ESS) and EV charging infrastructure markets.
Dominance of Chinese EVs in the passenger segment pressures EA's commercial EV pricing power.

macro_commodity_factors.logic: Directly impacts revenue from the solar and wind power segments under long-term PPA agreements.
Input cost for the 1GWh battery plant; price spikes in battery-grade chemicals squeeze operational EBITDA.
High oil prices increase the relative cost-competitiveness of biodiesel and the adoption speed of commercial EVs.
Weak THB inflates the cost of imported battery machinery and raw materials, despite benefiting minor export tranches.
